quote: Chant Hare Krishna and your life will become perfect.
The holy name of Krishna is transcendentally blissful. It bestows all spiritual benedictions, for it is Krishna Himself, the reservoir of all pleasure.
The mind can be controlled by engaging it in Krishna consciousness.
source: Bhagavad-gītā As It Is, Chapter 6 Lecture

quote: For one who has conquered the mind, the mind is the best of friends; but for one who has failed to do so, his very mind will be the greatest enemy.
Always think of Krishna and become His devotee. Worship Him and offer your homage unto Him.
Devotional service to the Lord is not an ordinary thing. It is above all material considerations. A devotee of the Lord is always transcendental.
The root cause of all miseries is material existence. If we place ourselves in the right position — by becoming Krishna conscious — we will be happy.
Real happiness is spiritual bliss. When one is fully Krishna conscious, he automatically feels full happiness, because he is in his constitutional position.
The purpose of human life is to understand God. Animals cannot understand God, but a human being can understand God, and that is the special facility given to human beings.
This human form of life is meant for God realization. Don't waste it for sense gratification, which is available even in the lower species.
The soul is never born nor dies at any time. It has not come into being, does not come into being, and will not come into being. It is unborn, eternal, ever-existing, and primeval.
As a person puts on new garments, giving up old ones, the soul similarly accepts new material bodies, giving up the old and useless ones.
Whatever state of being one remembers when he quits his body, that state he will attain without fail.
Do your duty without attachment to the fruit. By working in devotion, one does not accrue good or bad reactions.
The first requirement is to accept a bona fide spiritual master. Without a spiritual master, no one can make advancement in spiritual life.
Just try to learn the truth by approaching a spiritual master. Inquire from him submissively and render service unto him.
Whatever you do, whatever you eat, whatever you offer or give away, and whatever austerities you perform — do that as an offering to Me.
This material world is not our real home. We are spirit souls, and our real home is in the spiritual world, in the kingdom of God.
The living entity who has become conditioned by the material world should not think that the activities of the material world are meant for his enjoyment.
Prayer means submitting oneself completely to the Lord. The more you pray sincerely, the more the Lord reveals Himself to you.
Love means to give, not to take. Pure love of God means to give everything to God and expect nothing in return.
Bhagavad-gītā is the essence of all Vedic literature. Anyone who reads it carefully and follows its instructions will be free from all anxieties.
source: Introduction to Bhagavad-gītā As It Is

quote: Do not waste your valuable human life. Every moment should be utilized for God realization. Time, once gone, cannot be returned.
There can be no peace in the world without God consciousness. Peace means to know God and to act according to His will.
